# Notes

This fixture checks that planning-only mode produces documents and stops before application code.

## Scenario 1: Planning Only

The route creates Product Factory OS planning documents and does not scaffold application code.

## Scenario 2: architecture variants

The architecture section compares 2 or 3 viable variants before selecting one.

## Scenario 3: Review Gate

The generated plan includes review-ready `BUILD_PLAN.md`, `EXECUTION_GRAPH.md`, `IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md`, and quality gates.
